text.title: Experiment Ledger Discipline Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for one ledger entry. Validator enforces append-only fields + producer/consumer/decision + learning at close.

example.code: { "entry_id": "ent-2026q2-pricing-social-proof", "status": "closed", "producer": "@alex", "consumer": "@beth", "decision_fed": "Reposition pricing social proof for Q3 cycle", "hypothesis": "Moving social proof above the fold on /pricing increases pricing-to-signup conversion.", "variants": ["control", "above-fold"], "result": "+5.2% conversion lift, p=0.03, n=12400 sessions", "learning_summary": "Above-fold social proof lifts /pricing conversion 5.2% (n=12.4k, p=0.03). Effect concentrated in returning visitors (+8.1%); new visitors flat. Ship to all users; revisit new-visitor variant in Q3.", "tags": ["pricing", "social-proof", "above-fold"], "cycle_id": "2026-Q2", "created_at": "2026-04-15T09:00:00Z", "closed_at": "2026-05-20T17:00:00Z" }

example.note: producer = "team"; consumer + decision_fed missing; hypothesis < 20 chars; no tags; no learning_summary at close.

list.item: In-place modification of an existing entry without prev_entry_id + delta_reason (rule append-only).
